name: Winox Holdings Limited
summary: Winox Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, develops, manufactures, and sells stainless steel products. Its products include watch bracelets, mobile phone cases and parts, smart wearable cases and parts, costume jewelry, and leather and other fashion accessories. The company also provides management and administration services; and holds properties. It operates in Switzerland, the People's Republic of China, Liechtenstein and other European countries, Taiwan, Hong Kong, and internationally. The company was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Yau Tong, Hong Kong. Winox Holdings Limited is a subsidiary of Ming Fung Investment Limited.
